content:
Close the remaining bundle size gap and install performance gap between jet and established tools (webpack, pnpm).

### Current State

- **Bundle size**: react-bench produces 215KB (vs webpack 192KB) — 12% gap due to missing scope hoisting
- **Install perf**: cold install 4.9s (vs pnpm 3.4s) — metadata resolution is the bottleneck
- **Resolver bugs**: `||` range syntax, pre-release matching, optional dep platform filtering, `npm:` alias edge cases
- **Bundler pipeline**: tree shaking (619L), variable mangling (665L), DCE (513L), constant folding (706L) all implemented; no scope hoisting
- **Package manager**: 11 files (3,517L) with BFS resolver, parallel downloads, symlink linking, lockfile fast-path

### Target State

- **Bundle size ≤ 196KB**: Implement scope hoisting (module concatenation + cross-module DCE + unified minification)
- **Cold install ≤ 3.0s**: Persistent disk metadata cache at `~/.cache/jet`, HTTP/2 multiplexing, level-by-level parallel prefetch
- **Resolver correctness**: Fix all known bugs (#883) — version conflicts, `||` ranges, pre-release, space-separated ranges, optional deps
- **Built-in CSS pipeline**: PostCSS/Tailwind integration natively in Rust
- **Real-world validation**: Build and verify ≥2 React apps with Playwright smoke tests (#797)

### Schemas

#### ScopeHoistConfig

```json
{
  "$schema": "https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema",
  "$id": "jet://schemas/scope-hoist-config",
  "type": "object",
  "properties": {
    "enabled": { "type": "boolean", "default": true },
    "min_module_size": { "type": "integer", "default": 0, "description": "Minimum module size in bytes to consider for concatenation" },
    "max_concatenated_size": { "type": "integer", "default": 500000, "description": "Maximum concatenated module size before splitting" }
  }
}
```

#### MetadataCacheEntry

```json
{
  "$schema": "https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema",
  "$id": "jet://schemas/metadata-cache-entry",
  "type": "object",
  "required": ["package_name", "etag", "data", "cached_at"],
  "properties": {
    "package_name": { "type": "string" },
    "etag": { "type": ["string", "null"] },
    "data": { "type": "object", "description": "Abbreviated npm metadata JSON" },
    "cached_at": { "type": "string", "format": "date-time" },
    "ttl_seconds": { "type": "integer", "default": 300 }
  }
}
```
